title: Parts Salespersons
description: Sell spare and replacement parts and equipment in repair shop or parts store.

tasks.text: Receive payment or obtain credit authorization.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist customers, such as responding to customer complaints and updating them about back-ordered parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill customer orders from stock, and place orders when requested items are out of stock.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive and fill telephone orders for parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and label parts, and maintain inventory of stock.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare sales slips or sales contracts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read catalogs, microfiche viewers, or computer displays to determine replacement part stock numbers and prices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine replacement parts required, according to inspections of old parts, customer requests, or customers' descriptions of malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine returned parts for defects, and exchange defective parts or refund money.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage shipments by researching shipping methods or costs and tracking packages.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mark and store parts in stockrooms, according to prearranged systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain and clean work and inventory areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise customers on substitution or modification of parts when identical replacements are not available.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discuss use and features of various parts, based on knowledge of machines or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate equipment to customers, and explain functioning of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure parts, using precision measuring instruments, to determine whether similar parts may be machined to required sizes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
